author: Marcus Aurelius
quote: You have power over your mind, not outside events. Realize this, and you will find strength.

author: Marcus Aurelius
quote: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way.

author: Marcus Aurelius
quote: Very little is needed to make a happy life; it is all within yourself, in your way of thinking.

author: Marcus Aurelius
quote: Waste no more time arguing about what a good man should be. Be one.

author: Marcus Aurelius
quote: Accept the things to which fate binds you, and love the people with whom fate brings you together.

author: Marcus Aurelius
quote: The best revenge is to be unlike him who performed the injustry.

author: Marcus Aurelius
quote: It is not death that a man should fear, but he should fear never beginning to live.

author: Marcus Aurelius
quote: Never let the future disturb you. You will meet it, if you have to, with the same weapons of reason which today arm you against the present.

author: Marcus Aurelius
quote: The first rule is to keep an untroubled spirit. The second is to look things in the face and know them for what they are.

author: Marcus Aurelius
quote: Do not indulge in dreams of what you have not, but count the blessings you actually possess.

author: Epictetus
quote: Make the best use of what is in your power, and take the rest as it happens.

author: Epictetus
quote: He is a wise man who does not grieve for the things which he has not, but rejoices for those which he has.

author: Epictetus
quote: Men are disturbed not by things, but by the opinions about things.

author: Epictetus
quote: Seek not that the things which happen should happen as you wish; but wish the things which happen to be as they are, and you will have a tranquil flow of life.

author: Epictetus
quote: No man is free who is not master of himself.

author: Epictetus
quote: If you want to improve, be content to be thought foolish and stupid.

author: Epictetus
quote: We cannot choose our external circumstances, but we can always choose how we respond to them.

author: Epictetus
quote: First say to yourself what you would be; and then do what you have to do.

author: Epictetus
quote: It's not what happens to you, but how you react to it that matters.

author: Epictetus
quote: Wealth consists not in having great possessions, but in having few wants.

author: Seneca
quote: Luck is what happens when preparation meets opportunity.

author: Seneca
quote: It is not that I'm so smart. But I stay with the questions much longer.

author: Seneca
quote: We suffer more in imagination than in reality.

author: Seneca
quote: Begin at once to live, and count each separate day as a separate life.

author: Seneca
quote: It is not the man who has too little, but the man who craves more, that is poor.

author: Seneca
quote: Associate with those who will make a better man of you.

author: Seneca
quote: A gem cannot be polished without friction, nor a man perfected without trials.

author: Seneca
quote: Retire into yourself as much as possible.

author: Seneca
quote: If you really want to escape the things that harass you, what you need is not to be in a different place but to be a different person.

author: Zeno of Citium
quote: Happiness is a good flow of life.

author: Zeno of Citium
quote: The goal of life is living in agreement with nature.

author: Zeno of Citium
quote: We have two ears and one mouth, so we should listen more than we say.

author: Zeno of Citium
quote: Better to trip with the feet than with the tongue.

author: Cleanthes
quote: Wealth is the slave of a wise man and the master of a fool.

author: Chrysippus
quote: The universe is one great city full of beloved ones, divine and human by nature.

author: Chrysippus
quote: Virtue is a habit of the mind, consistent with nature and reason.

author: Cato the Younger
quote: I begin to speak only when I'm certain what I'll say isn't better left unsaid.

author: Cato the Younger
quote: An angry man opens his mouth and shuts his eyes.

author: Musonius Rufus
quote: Of all things, the most disgraceful is to think well of oneself.

author: Musonius Rufus
quote: We should take care of our body only insofar as it supports the use of reason.

author: Musonius Rufus
quote: In order to protect ourselves we must live like doctors and be continually treating ourselves with reason.

author: Yoda
quote: Do or do not. There is no try.
source: Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back

author: Yoda
quote: Train yourself to let go of everything you fear to lose.
source: Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith

author: Yoda
quote: The greatest teacher, failure is.

author: Yoda
quote: Fear is the path to the dark side. Fear leads to anger, anger leads to hate, hate leads to suffering.

author: Qui-Gon Jinn
quote: Your focus determines your reality.

author: Ahsoka Tano
quote: The right path is not always the easiest one.

author: Ahsoka Tano
quote: I am no longer the Jedi I once was, but I still fight for those who cannot fight for themselves.

author: Obi-Wan Kenobi
quote: In my experience, there is no such thing as luck.
